source_jobs.title: Backend Engineer - AI
source_jobs.description:
Anything

Anything is the AI product engineer for the next wave of entrepreneurs.

It's an AI agent that turns English into apps. Everything you need make money on the internet built in - mobile, web, design, AI, backend, infra, payments.

Launched Aug 7th. https://x.com/anything
Hit $5m rev and growing quickly
Try it at anything.com



Role




WHAT THIS ROLE IS

This role is for people who want to grow faster than they could anywhere else. You will work on real AI systems from day one and take ownership of meaningful product work. You will tackle challenging problems, learn new tools constantly, and operate in an environment where speed, ambition, and personal growth are core expectations. You will be supported by senior engineers but trusted to figure things out, push through ambiguity, and build systems that reach millions of users. This is a place for people who want to develop world class skills early in their career.

You will be expected to move fast with clarity–reasoning through tradeoffs, writing things down when helpful, and choosing solutions that fit the broader system.


HOW YOU WILL OPERATE

 - Break down complex or unclear problems into clear steps and propose practical solutions

 - Make thoughtful tradeoffs between speed, correctness, and long-term maintainability

 - Build AI powered features using TypeScript and modern AI frameworks

 - Collaborate closely with product and design to align on goals and ship with confidence

 - Talk with users and use the product yourself to understand real-world needs and opportunities

 - Push through obstacles with resourcefulness and a strong problem-solving mindset

 - Learn new concepts quickly and apply them to real production challenges

 - Stay up to date on the latest in AI research and engineering

 - Take on tasks that stretch your abilities and work hard to close skill gaps quickly

 - Contribute to a culture of ownership, ambition, and fast-paced learning

AI is a rapidly evolving field, and no one here has all the answers. We value humility, openness to feedback, and a willingness to revise your thinking as you learn. Strong opinions are welcome when they are paired with curiosity and respect for evidence.


PRIMARY OUTCOMES

Your success will be measured by:

1. Independent problem-solving and execution
You take goals, investigate unknowns, evaluate options, and deliver solutions without waiting for extensive guidance.

2. Fast skill growth
You significantly expand your technical range within your first months through hands-on work and deliberate learning.

3. Shipped product impact
Your features improve user experience, performance, and product depth in measurable and well-reasoned ways


REQUIRED BACKGROUND

Candidates typically show:

 - A strong technical foundation from a top CS program or equivalent hands-on experience building real systems

 - Evidence of ambitious, self-driven projects or internships that required problem solving and ownership

 - Solid programming fundamentals and comfort with TypeScript

 - Exceptional ability to read deeply, reason clearly, and communicate complex ideas

 - Curiosity about AI systems and a desire to push beyond easy or obvious solutions

 - A personal track record of learning quickly and putting in real effort to master difficult skills

 - Experience working in fast-paced environments while balancing care with urgency.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Prior internships in AI, backend, or infrastructure engineering

 - Previously been one of the first 10 hires at startup

 - Personal projects that show initiative, creativity, and independent thinking

 - Backgrounds or interests that span technical and non-technical domains (e.g. writing, design, philosophy, economics, etc)


WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

We are building products on the frontier of AI and that requires a team that learns fast, thinks clearly, and works hard. You will grow more in one year here than in several years at a typical company. You will take on challenges that

source_jobs.title: Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Anything

Anything is the AI product engineer for the next wave of entrepreneurs.

It's an AI agent that turns English into apps. Everything you need make money on the internet built in - mobile, web, design, AI, backend, infra, payments.

Launched Aug 7th. https://x.com/anything
Hit $5m rev and growing quickly
Try it at anything.com



Role




WHAT THIS ROLE IS

This role is for people who want to grow faster than they could anywhere else. You’ll build the systems that supports millions of applications and billions of users, and tackle all the challenges that come with it. You’ll design and operate the runtime, control plane, and isolation boundaries that safely execute user-generated applications at scale.

You’ll invent systems that leverage platform telemetry, execution data, and feedback loops to improve code generation and application performance, enabled by a platform designed with AI at its core.

You will own major parts of the platform end-to-end, from architecture and implementation through production operation and iteration.


HOW YOU WILL OPERATE

 - Design and operate multi-tenant cloud infrastructure, including isolation, deployment, observability, and cost controls for customer applications

 - Maintain world-class reliability for our platform

 - Research and make decisions on technology choices, and service providers

 - Collaborate with product to build platform features that support product innovation

 - Keep up to date with the latest in infrastructure research and development

Running a best-in-class platform requires a cool head, and maintaining your disposition when shit hits the fan. We value self-confidence paired with curiosity, and a respect for evidence.


PRIMARY OUTCOMES

Your success will be measured by:

1. Runtime infrastructure
Design and operate scalable, low-latency infrastructure for user app serving

2. Platform Reliability
You will be responsible for the uptime and reliability of our platform, ensuring failures are isolated and do not cascade across customers. Our users expect high availability and quick resolution when issues arise.

3. Platform Support for Product Features
You will build out the platform features necessary to enable our product roadmap, including primitives for real-time data transfer, background execution, and scalable APIs.


REQUIRED BACKGROUND

Candidates typically show:

 - A strong technical foundation from a top CS program or equivalent hands-on experience building real scalable systems

 - Experience building or operating distributed systems in production (cloud infrastructure, backend services, or platforms)

 - Evidence of ambitious, self-driven projects or work that required problem solving and ownership

 - Experience designing scalable systems that support many users

 - Solid programming fundamentals and some experience with Typescript

 - Exceptional ability to read deeply, reason clearly, and communicate complex ideas

 - Experience working in fast-paced environments while balancing care with urgency


NICE TO HAVE

 - Prior experience in platform, infrastructure, or backend roles

 - Experience building early-stage systems at a scaleup

 - Previous experience as a sysadmin

 - Personal projects that show initiative, creativity, and independent thinking

 - Backgrounds or interests that span technical and non-technical domains (e.g. writing, design, philosophy, economics, etc)


WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

We are building the cloud that will support the next billion developers. This role will own large critical pieces of infrastructure that will support a large and growing platform. You will take on challenges that stretch your abilities and solve problems that materially shape the future of the product.

As the platform grows, your work will define the reliability, performance, and safety guarantees our users build on. This is foundational infrastructure, and it has to work.



In all roles


We look for:



Intense. Ship fast. Cycles are hours, not weeks

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Anything

Anything is the AI product engineer for the next wave of entrepreneurs.

It's an AI agent that turns English into apps. Everything you need make money on the internet built in - mobile, web, design, AI, backend, infra, payments.

Launched Aug 7th. https://x.com/anything
Hit $5m rev and growing quickly
Try it at anything.com



Role




WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR

This role is for an experienced product engineer who wants real ownership, real leverage, and real impact.

You have already shipped meaningful products and systems. You are comfortable taking responsibility for outcomes, not just execution. You care deeply about product quality, system design, and user experience, and you want your decisions to shape the direction of what gets built.

You thrive in environments with ambiguity. You are energized by loosely defined problems and take initiative to clarify goals, explore constraints, and drive toward strong solutions. You are trusted to make technical and product tradeoffs independently and to mentor others by example.

You enjoy working across the stack and across disciplines. You move fluidly between backend systems, frontend interfaces, and product decisions. You want to help define how a product is built, not just implement tickets.

This is not a role for someone who wants narrow scope or heavy process. It is for someone who wants to operate as a force multiplier.


WHAT YOU WILL DO

You will own complex, high impact product work end to end, from early problem framing through production and iteration.

You will:

 - Lead the design and implementation of user facing features across frontend and backend using TypeScript, React, Tailwind, and Postgres

 - Translate ambiguous product goals into clear technical plans and shipped outcomes

 - Partner closely with product and design to shape roadmap decisions and execution strategy

 - Talk directly with users to understand workflows, pain points, and opportunities
   

 - Drive fast iteration loops using feedback, data, and firsthand product usage

 - Raise the quality bar through thoughtful system design, testing, and code review

 - Identify and resolve structural issues that slow the team or degrade product quality

 - Mentor junior engineers through pairing, feedback, and setting strong technical examples

 - Contribute to a culture of ownership, clarity, and high standards
   

You will be expected to move fast while thinking holistically, choosing solutions that scale with the product and team rather than optimizing for short term convenience.

How you will be successful

Your success will be measured by:

 1. End to end ownership
    You take responsibility for important product areas, drive decisions, and reliably deliver high quality features without heavy oversight.
    

 2. Technical and product leadership
    You make sound architectural and product tradeoffs, improve system quality over time, and elevate the thinking of those around you.
    

 3. Shipped product impact
    Your work measurably improves user experience, product depth, reliability, and development velocity.
    


REQUIRED BACKGROUND

Strong candidates typically have:

 - Several years of experience building and shipping production software

 - A strong technical foundation from a CS program or equivalent real world experience

 - Experience owning significant product or system areas end to end

 - Deep comfort with TypeScript and modern frontend development

 - Solid backend fundamentals including data modeling, APIs, and system design

 - Strong debugging skills and the ability to reason through complex systems

 - Clear written and verbal communication

 - A demonstrated ability to learn new domains quickly and apply them in practice

 - Experience operating in fast paced environments with high ownership
   


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience at an early stage or high growth startup

 - Experience collaborating deeply with design and product partners

 - A track record of mentoring or leadi

source_jobs.title: Mobile Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Anything

Anything is the AI product engineer for the next wave of entrepreneurs.

It's an AI agent that turns English into apps. Everything you need make money on the internet built in - mobile, web, design, AI, backend, infra, payments.

Launched Aug 7th. https://x.com/anything
Hit $5m rev and growing quickly
Try it at anything.com



Role




WHAT THIS ROLE IS

This role is for an experienced mobile engineer who strives in creating beautiful and smooth mobile experiences. You will work closely with designers and define the UX for mobile vibe coding. You must have a vision on what an “excellent” mobile experience is and you will have the freedom to execute that vision.


HOW YOU WILL OPERATE

 - Implement pixel-perfect designs

 - Define delightful gestures to improve the user experience

 - Make thoughtful tradeoffs between speed, correctness, and long-term maintainability

 - Talk with users and use the product yourself to understand real-world needs and opportunities

 - Take on tasks that stretch your abilities and work hard to close skill gaps quickly

 - Contribute to a culture of ownership, ambition, and fast-paced learning

There is no existing design paradigm for mobile vibe coding. We value courage, creativity, and a willingness to revise your solution as you iterate.


PRIMARY OUTCOMES

Your success will be measured by:

1. Independent problem-solving and execution
You take goals, investigate unknowns, evaluate options, and deliver solutions without waiting for extensive guidance.

2. Fast skill growth
You significantly expand your technical range within your first months through hands-on work and deliberate learning.

3. Shipped product impact
Your features improve user experience, performance, and product depth in measurable and well-reasoned ways


REQUIRED BACKGROUND

Candidates typically show:

 - A strong technical foundation from a top CS program or equivalent hands-on experience building React Native apps

 - Evidence of high quality taste in mobile experiences

 - High empathy for your teammates and users

 - Solid programming fundamentals with comfort in TypeScript and React Native

 - Experience working in fast-paced environments while balancing care with urgency


NICE TO HAVE

 - Previously been one of the first 10 hires at startup

 - Figma experience

 - Swift / Kotlin experience

 - Backgrounds or interests that span technical and non-technical domains (e.g. writing, design, philosophy, economics, etc)


WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

We are shaping the frontier of mobile vibe coding. Thousands of people are using our app on a daily basis and all of your contributions will shape their experience.



In all roles


We look for:



Intense. Ship fast. Cycles are hours, not weeks. Hard to outwork.

Ownership. Grab the #1 priority and relentless to deliver.

Fearlessness. Risk on. Do the unknown / uncomfortable. Say "good" to bad news.

Taste. Obsess over quality. Know what “great” looks like. No slop.

Play. Curiosity, joy, and energy.



Sound like you?

Come do the most meaningful work of your career.


Applying

Submit here and we'll reach out if it's a fit.

notes: AI product engineer for entrepreneurs, launched Aug 7th, hit $5m rev and growing quickly
